final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system for web dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in classic minimalist tech style.

Style/medium: clean flat UI design system, classic minimalist tech aesthetic, modern SaaS dashboard UI kit, Figma-style components
Composition: comprehensive component library layout showing web dashboard mockup, mobile interface, card components, button variants, and form controls arranged in organized grid
Subject: UI component collection including data visualization cards, navigation bars, toggle switches, input fields, primary/secondary buttons, stat cards, and mobile screens
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray canvas background with subtle grid system, organized spacing showing design system hierarchy
Lighting/mood: clean even lighting, professional product presentation, crisp and precise
Color palette: deep navy and charcoal as primary, electric blue as accent, white and light gray for surfaces, high contrast for hierarchy
Materials/textures: smooth matte surfaces, subtle shadows for depth, clean vector edges, no gradients unless essential
Constraints: all components must be scalable vector-based; maintain 8px grid alignment; support dark mode variant
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; drop shadows heavier than 8px; more than 3 accent colors; decorative flourishes; 3D effects; glassmorphism blur
